title: GlowingNeonMelow's Fabric Modpack
description: This modpack brings together top performance mods, stunning shaders, handy tools, and extra features to enhance your gameplay
body:
This modpack combines high-performance mods, immersive shaders, and quality-of-life tools to enhance Minecraft without unnecessary bloat. It provides a smooth, visually stunning foundation for building your own modpack or client, while keeping gameplay fast and enjoyable.

Features:

Performance improvements: Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, More Culling, and Concurrent Chunk Management Engine optimize FPS and reduce lag.

Visual upgrades: Iris Shaders, Photon Shaders, Bliss Shaders, and resource packs like Dramatic Skys and Connected Paths bring Minecraft to life.

Quality-of-life tools, Mod Menu, 3D Skin Layers, Simple Voice Chat, and More Chat History make gameplay more convenient.

Customizable foundation: APIs and utilities like YetAnotherConfigLib, Text Placeholder API, and Dynamic FPS let you tweak the experience.

Included mods, resource packs, and shaders are listed below for reference.

Mods:

Sodium
ImmediatelyFast
More Culling
Model Gap Fix
Mod Menu
Distant Horizons
3D Skin Layers
FerriteCore
Simple Voice Chat
Iris Shaders
BadOptimizations
Entity Culling
More Chat History

Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)
YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
Fabric API
Lithium
Cloth Config API
Text Placeholder API
Dynamic FPS
